blended.narrative: Mount Washington is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 912 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
